MktCalcInsightObjectDef.expression: SELECT UnifiedLinkssotIndividualCoff__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c AS UnifiedIndividualId__c, count(Web_Event_c_Home__dlm.Id__c) AS WebEventCount__c, max(Web_Event_c_Home__dlm.Occurred_At_c__c) AS LastWebActivity__c FROM Web_Event_c_Home__dlm JOIN UnifiedLinkssotIndividualCoff__dlm ON UnifiedLinkssotIndividualCoff__dlm.SourceRecordId__c = Web_Event_c_Home__dlm.Account_c__c GROUP BY UnifiedLinkssotIndividualCoff__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c
